guidance: Review the modifications to `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml`. Verify that the new ISO size validation step utilizes fast O(1) metadata checks like `stat -c%s` and native bash globbing for file discovery (e.g., `shopt -s nullglob; files=(out/*.iso); ISO_FILE="${files[0]:-}"`) to prevent the introduction of slow subprocess-heavy pipelines (like `find ... | head -1`).
